title: Medjool Medley
description: A savory, dense, energizing French dish featuring Medjool dates with a light air-fry twist, egg-free-friendly for those following dietary restrictions.
instructions: Place the Medjool dates in a small bowl. If using, add honey or maple syrup and cinnamon powder; mix well.
Drain any residual almond milk from the medjool dates into another bowl if needed.
Dip each date into ground nutmeg and place them in the air fryer basket.
Cook for 5 minutes without opening the door. Flip once during cooking.
Remove from heat and let sit for a minute before serving.
